selections.name: Alpha Kadin
selections.reason: Top speed figure of 102 and fits the Tapeta closer bias perfectly. Wore down foe late in last start.

selections.name: Heaven's Champion
selections.reason: Strong class rating and visually impressive swoop 5-wide in last start. Synthetic surface upgrades late kick.

selections.name: Givememythememusic
selections.reason: Classy presser who prevailed in a 4-wide duel last out. Consistent form cycle.

selections.name: Commander At Sea
selections.reason: Determined effort between horses last out. Solid pace figures make him a threat for the exotics.

danger_horse.name: Catholic Jackie
danger_horse.reason: Fanned 9-wide last out but still ran evenly. Forgiving the trip makes him a live longshot.

selections.name: Speedy Connection
selections.reason: Classy runner dropping in. Speed figures are consistent and fits the par adjustment well.

selections.name: Grand Warrior (JPN)
selections.reason: Stymied through the stretch last out (Grade A trouble). Upgraded significantly off the excuse.

selections.name: Interim Analysis
selections.reason: Off the rail and drifted last out, but possesses the raw speed to contend if he runs straight.

selections.name: Rainbows Hero
selections.reason: Retreated 3-wide last out but has back class to hit the board at a price.

danger_horse.name: Royal Fonz
danger_horse.reason: Broke out and retreated last start, but early speed could play a factor if uncontested.

selections.name: Stratus
selections.reason: Class standout (104) with consistent speed figures. Kept on well last out and draws favorably.

selections.name: Somekinda Mischief
selections.reason: Tracked 3-wide and surged clear last out. Form cycle is peaking.

selections.name: Silver Raleigh
selections.reason: Saved ground evenly last out. Needs pace to run at but fits the class level.

selections.name: Out N Out Disgrace
selections.reason: Angled 5-6 wide last out. Better trip puts him in the mix for the bottom of the superfecta.

danger_horse.name: Starvin
danger_horse.reason: Fanned 7-wide last out. Capable of better with a ground-saving trip.

selections.name: My Covenant
selections.reason: Massive class rating (114). Rallied 3-wide last out and looks primed for a top effort.

selections.name: Highland Blue
selections.reason: Bumped at the start and forced 4-wide last out but still got 2nd. Major threat with a clean break.

selections.name: Carnew
selections.reason: Willingly up for show last out. Consistent speed figures make him a reliable exotic piece.

selections.name: Sammysaurus Rex
selections.reason: Held safe on the inside last out. Steps up but has the tactical speed to press the pace.

danger_horse.name: Kokomo
danger_horse.reason: Faded late last out but has back class and could hang on for a share if left alone early.

exotic_strategy.strategy: Win Bet #4, Exacta Box 2-4, Trifecta Box 1-2-4

selections.name: Warhol
selections.reason: Elite speed figure (110) and class (105). Full of run late last out. Perfect fit for the massive turf course.

selections.name: Backroadsbilly
selections.reason: Top speed figure in the field (111). Could not hold the lead last out but tactical speed is dangerous here.

selections.name: Shak Town
selections.reason: Off bit slow but dueled 3-wide last out. High class rating (110) keeps him right in the mix.

selections.name: Cajun Influence
selections.reason: Prevailed through the stretch last out. Steps up in class but has the form to compete.

danger_horse.name: Impulsive Bid
danger_horse.reason: Pressed and led before retreating last out. Could be the lone speed if others falter.

selections.name: War Legend
selections.reason: Top speed figure (112). Rallied inside last out and fits the Tapeta profile perfectly.

selections.name: Mister Blue
selections.reason: Broke in and led before being caught last out. High class rating (113) makes him a major player.

selections.name: Tranquillo
selections.reason: Chased 2-3 wide and weakened last out, but raw speed figures suggest he is better than that effort.

selections.name: Aterya
selections.reason: Dueled stubbornly between horses last out. Inside draw could force him to use early energy.

danger_horse.name: Beyond Adversity
danger_horse.reason: Chased 3-4 wide with no rally last out. Capable of a bounce-back effort at a price.

selections.name: Nanina (GER)
selections.reason: Strong speed figure (110). Rallied nicely last out and should appreciate the synthetic surface.

selections.name: My Turn Now
selections.reason: Set pace and faded last out. If she gets an uncontested lead, she could wire the field.

selections.name: Inescapable
selections.reason: Forced in late last out. Forgiving the trip makes her a live contender in a field with many first-time starters.

selections.name: Borika (IRE)
selections.reason: Determinedly second best last out. Consistent form makes her a safe exotic inclusion.

danger_horse.name: Golden Sunset
danger_horse.reason: Unhurried and ran evenly inside last out. Could pick up the pieces if the pace melts down.

exotic_strategy.strategy: Win Bet #6, Exacta Box 3-6, Trifecta Box 3-6-8

selections.name: Believein
selections.reason: Stalked 2-wide with no headway last out, but class rating (112) and speed (109) are top tier.

selections.name: Highwaytothemoon
selections.reason: Surged late to get up last out. Perfect fit for the Tapeta closer bias.

selections.name: Military Time
selections.reason: Bid 3/16, lugged in 1/8, but cleared. Very talented and a major threat despite the quirks.

selections.name: Thundermaker
selections.reason: Asked 3/16 and held sway last out. Consistent runner who will be in the mix.

danger_horse.name: Brachetto
danger_horse.reason: Reluctant but tenacious last out. Has the class to upset if the top choices falter.

selections.name: Crumlin Lad
selections.reason: Gave way grudgingly last out but possesses elite speed (111). Dangerous on the turf.

selections.name: Legal Catch
selections.reason: Dropped off early last out but has a massive late kick. Turf course suits his sustained running style.

selections.name: Itsastormymonday
selections.reason: Traffic trouble in the stretch last out. Upgraded off the excuse and draws the rail.

selections.name: El Kabong
selections.reason: Outgamed last out but has the class and speed to hit the board at a price.

danger_horse.name: Cash The Money
danger_horse.reason: Late energy last out. Consistent turf runner who can't be ignored in exotics.

selections.name: Tanist
selections.reason: Never involved last out but has the highest raw speed figure (105) of those with data. Value play.

selections.name: Eubank
selections.reason: Fanned 7-wide last out and still ran second best. Huge upgrade with a better trip.

selections.name: Up N The Ante
selections.reason: Cleared 1/2 and weakened last out. High class rating (112) makes him dangerous if he dictates pace.

selections.name: Master Steal
selections.reason: Loose lead and just missed last out. Will be a factor early.

danger_horse.name: Mr. Perfect
danger_horse.reason: Lacked rally stretch last out but has back class to hit the superfecta.
